headers.dashboardDescription: Track operational readiness for calls, messages, and booking.

recentCalls.description: {{count}} recent calls in the latest activity feed.

setup.title: Create your first business
setup.description: This bootstraps the tenant, receptionist profile, and the first snapshot used by voice.
setup.created: Business created. The receptionist snapshot is refreshing now.

calls.title: Calls handled
calls.footer: Latest inbound activity available in the inbox.

services.title: Services configured
services.footer: These feed both the receptionist and the booking engine.

hours.footer: Structured hours stay authoritative over documents.

knowledge.title: Knowledge items

quickActions.title: Quick actions
quickActions.description: Keep {{businessName}} ready for calls, SMS, and booking workflows.

nextSteps.title: What to do next
nextSteps.description: Tighten the live receptionist behavior before you route real traffic.
nextSteps.hours: Set hours, services, and bookable team assignments so booking can suggest real times.
nextSteps.transfer: Add transfer rules and a fallback number before handing off urgent calls.
nextSteps.snapshot: Refresh your snapshot after major policy changes so voice picks them up quickly.
